title: gitmap temp-releaselist --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap temp-releaselist --json`. Top-level is an array of temporary release branch records. Field order is contractual: id, branch, versionPrefix, sequenceNumber, commit, commitMessage, createdAt.

id.description: Primary key of the temp-release row.

branch.description: Name of the temporary release branch.

versionPrefix.description: Semver prefix used when the branch was created (e.g. 'v5.76').

sequenceNumber.description: Monotonic sequence number within the prefix.

commit.description: SHA of the commit the temp-release points to.

commitMessage.description: Message of the commit the temp-release points to.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the temp-release was created.
